prestazioni: Engine swap to a **4ZC1-T** (2.0L turbocharged inline-4, 120 PS stock) with a **Garrett GT2860RS** turbocharger, custom **Tomei 260° camshafts**, and a **HKS F-Con V Pro** standalone ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping. Pair with a **Nismo 555cc top-feed fuel injectors** and a **Walbro 255 LPH fuel pump** to support 300+ HP on E85.

Full **ISUZU Gemini RS-based drivetrain reinforcement** with a **PPG close-ratio 5-speed dogbox transmission**, **OS Giken 2.1 LSD**, and **Nismo carbon driveshaft** to handle increased torque. Clutch upgraded to a **Spec Stage 3+ twin-disc** with a **Nissan R32 GTR pressure plate** for durability.

Suspension overhaul using **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (custom valved for the Aska’s **JT190 chassis**), **SuperPro poly bushings** (front control arms, subframe, and trailing arms), and **Cusco 22mm front / 19mm rear sway bars** to eliminate body roll. Braking upgraded to **Endless CC-R6 rotors (280mm front, 260mm rear)** with **AP Racing CP5556 calipers** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Aska-specific widebody kit** (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with integrated **Seibon carbon hood** and **Voltex GT-Wing Type 2** on a **C-West rear diffuser**). Full **3M Matte Military Green (9003) wrap** with **JDM Garage Boge side decals** and **Isuzu Racing Team-inspired roof striping**.

**Work Meister S1 3P 16x8 +38 wheels** (ET38) with **Yokohama Advan A052 225/45/16 tires** for aggressive stance. **Custom rear quarter window delete** with **carbon fiber inserts** and **LED taillight conversion** using **Vland sequential units** (OEM-style housing).

**Interior stripped and reinforced** with a **Sparco Pro ADV seat** (fixed-back, 8-point harness), **Takata Drift II steering wheel**, and **Defi BF gauges** (boost, oil pressure, wideband AFR) mounted on a **custom A-pillar pod**. **Sound deadening removed** and replaced with **Dynamat Xtreme** in critical areas for weight reduction and NVH control.
